sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60278" key="kruyi/domos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρυψί-δομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n60278.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dwelling in secret places</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0579.tlg001:51:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">51.3</biblScope> </bibl> (Casaub. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κρυψίδρομος</foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">running secretly</tr_>).</sense> </entryFree>
